payload.message:
Run now:
export GOG_KEYRING_PASSWORD='peatoimetaja2026' && /data/bin/gog gmail messages search 'is:unread in:inbox'

If empty, answer exactly: INBOX_EMPTY

For each message result:
1) Read threadId, messageId, subject, from, receivedAt.
2) Check latest ledger state for threadId in state/ledger.jsonl. If latest status is TRIAGED/DRAFTED/EDITED/NOTIFIED/SKIPPED, skip.
3) Append NEW event to state/ledger.jsonl with required fields: threadId, messageId, subject, from, receivedAt, prescore, finalscore, status, docsLinks, lastError, createdAt, updatedAt.
4) Spawn Postiluure (non-blocking):
   sessions_spawn agentId='postiluure' task='Triagi threadId=<threadId> messageId=<messageId> subject=<subject> from=<from> receivedAt=<receivedAt>. Fetch full body only if prescore >= 6. Append TRIAGED/SKIPPED/FAILED ledger event.'
5) Mark processed thread read:
   export GOG_KEYRING_PASSWORD='peatoimetaja2026' && /data/bin/gog gmail labels modify <threadId> --remove UNREAD

Do not wait for subagent completion. Return counts: total, queued, skipped-existing.

Run now:
export GOG_KEYRING_PASSWORD='peatoimetaja2026' && /data/bin/gog gmail messages search 'is:unread in:inbox'

If empty, answer exactly: INBOX_EMPTY

For each message result:
1) Read threadId, messageId, subject, from, receivedAt.
2) Check latest ledger state for threadId in state/ledger.jsonl. If latest status is TRIAGED/DRAFTED/EDITED/NOTIFIED/SKIPPED, skip.
3) Append NEW event to state/ledger.jsonl with required fields: threadId, messageId, subject, from, receivedAt, prescore, finalscore, status, docsLinks, lastError, createdAt, updatedAt.
4) Spawn Postiluure (non-blocking):
   sessions_spawn agentId='postiluure' task='Triagi threadId=<threadId> messageId=<messageId> subject=<subject> from=<from> receivedAt=<receivedAt>. Fetch full body only if prescore >= 6. Append TRIAGED/SKIPPED/FAILED ledger event.'
5) Mark processed thread read:
   export GOG_KEYRING_PASSWORD='peatoimetaja2026' && /data/bin/gog gmail labels modify <threadId> --remove UNREAD

Do not wait for subagent completion. Return counts: total, queued, skipped-existing.

Reconcile state from state/ledger.jsonl.

1) Build latest state per threadId.
2) For each TRIAGED item with finalscore >= 6 and no DRAFTED/EDITED/FAILED event, spawn:
   sessions_spawn agentId='kirjutaja' task='Koosta draft threadId=<threadId> messageId=<messageId>. Kirjuta DRAFTED ledger event koos docsLinks.'
3) For each DRAFTED item with docsLinks and no EDITED/FAILED event, spawn:
   sessions_spawn agentId='toimetaja' task='Toimeta lugu threadId=<threadId> docsLink=<docsLink>. Kirjuta EDITED ledger event koos docsLinks.'
4) Collect threads where latest status is DRAFTED or EDITED and thread not yet NOTIFIED.
5) If none, return an empty response (no summary)
6) If there are items, send one summary message with top items, scores, and docs links.
7) After summary, append NOTIFIED event per included thread.

Do not wait for spawned agent completion in this run.
